zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Weston V於1330年出生在英國素瑞韋斯特 可藍頓時，他的父親William de Weston2歲，母親Agness de Climpsfold de Weston-2歲。他和Joan Leghe至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他於1418年被列為high sheriff of surrey。他去世於1418年7月3日在他的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Weston V于1330年出生在英国素瑞韋斯特 可藍頓时，他的父亲William de Weston2岁，母亲Agness de Climpsfold de Weston-2岁。他和Joan Leghe至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他于1418年被列为high sheriff of surrey。他去世于1418年7月3日在他的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Weston V was born in 1330, in West Clandon, Surrey, England, his father, William de Weston, was 2 and his mother, Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, was -2. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Joan Leghe. In 1418, at the age of 88, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of surrey. He died on 3 July 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Weston V est né en 1330, à West Clandon, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William de Weston, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, avait -2 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Joan Leghe. En 1418, à l’âge de 88 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of surrey. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Weston V 1330 in West Clandon, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Weston 2 und seine Mutter Agness de Climpsfold de Weston -2. Er hatte mit Joan Leghe mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1418, als er 88 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of surrey aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Juli 1418 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston V è nato il nel 1330 nel West Clandon, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William de Weston, aveva 2 anni e il suo madre, Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, aveva -2 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Joan Leghe. Nel 1418, all'età di 88 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of surrey. Morì il 3 luglio 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Weston Vが1330年にイギリススリーウエスト クランドンで生まれた時，父William de Westonは2歳，母Agness de Climpsfold de Westonは-2歳であった。彼はJoan Legheとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1418年，88歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of surreyと記録されている。彼は1418年7月3日に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Weston V(이)가 1330년 영국 수리 웨스트 클랜던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Weston(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Agness de Climpsfold de Weston(은)는 -2세였다. 그는 Joan Leghe(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1418년, 88세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of surrey이었다. 그는 1418년 7월 3일 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston V nasceu em 1330, em West Clandon, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Weston, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, tinha -2 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Joan Leghe. Em 1418, com 88 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of surrey. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Weston V родился в 1330 г. в местности вест кландон, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Weston было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, -2. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Joan Leghe. В 1418 году, в возрасте 88 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of surrey. Он умер 3 июля 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Weston V nació en 1330, en West Clandon, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Weston, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Agness de Climpsfold de Weston, tenía -2 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Joan Leghe. En 1418, a la edad de 88 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of surrey. Murió el 3 de julio de 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
